payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden dining chair showing the lower two-thirds: a padded red upholstered seat, curved front legs and a horizontal stretcher beneath; wood has a glossy finish and the backrest is only partially visible at the left; approximately 1.5 meters from camera.
